title: Word Sort Solitaire | Ethan Mayer
rootText: Word Sort SolitaireBuried clue cards, five live crowns, and a tighter layout.Start RoundNext LevelHintDrawGo FullscreenLevelAssociation DealMoves Left72Score0Best0Streak0Cleared0/6Visible Clues1Undo1Joker0Shuffle1Crown StatusEmpty 1Empty 2Empty 3Empty 4Empty 5StatusUncover clue cards from the deal, claim crowns, and stack matching words by association.C 1: BirchC 2: SaddleC 3: WhiskC 4: TurnsignalC 5: IgnitionWaste EmptyEmpty 1Empty 2Empty 3Empty 4Empty 5Undo (1)Joker (0)Shuffle (1)Mobile NotesTap a column or waste card to select it, then tap a crown or column to move it. Buried clue cards have to be uncovered before a crown can claim them.
